provisions.content:
COMPANIES ACT (INCORPORATED CELL COMPANIES
CARRYING ON BUSINESS OF INSURANCE)

[ L.S.386.13

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 386.13
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INCORPORATED CELL
COMPANIES CARRYING ON BUSINESS OF
INSURANCE TAĦT L-ATT DWAR IL-KUMPANNIJI*
1 ta’ Frar, 2011
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 558 tal-2010, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 392 tal2015.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
